name: Duke University
meets_full_need_notes: Duke meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students. Families with income under $65,000 typically pay nothing; under $150,000 receive substantial grant aid.
no_loan_notes: Duke includes a modest loan component in financial aid packages. Duke Knight-Hennessy Scholars and some specific programs may be loan-free. General undergraduate aid still includes loans, though amounts are reduced for lower-income families.

merit_thresholds.notes: Duke offers prestigious merit scholarships including the Angier B. Duke Memorial Scholarship and A.B. Duke Scholarship. These are competitive, separately applied for, full-ride or near-full-ride awards. General admission does not carry automatic merit aid.

ed_aid_implications: Duke financial aid is need-blind for domestic ED applicants. Same need-based calculation applies to ED and RD students. Aid package released with ED decision.
special_programs: Angier B. Duke Memorial Scholarship (full merit)
appeal_policy: Duke considers appeals for changed financial circumstances. Students contact Office of Undergraduate Financial Aid to initiate the Special Circumstances review.
